text: Financial metrics reflect strong operational efficiency, with Q3 2025 gross margin at 55.56%, operating margin at 19.61%, and net margin at 17.56%. Cash flow generation was exceptionally strong, producing a free cash flow margin of 97.21% for the quarter. The bank continues to demonstrate investment banking competitiveness through participation in major transactions, including arranging $12.25 billion in debt for the Hologic buyout alongside Citigroup and Barclays.
